content.text: How do I ensure a geometry is correctly projected into a specific spatial reference system without losing its data?
If the initial geometry object lacks a defined spatial reference (i.e., it has a missing sref), what specific error will this function raise?
It raises an Exception with the message 'Cannot transform from unknown spatial reference' if `geom_sref` is `None`, explicitly preventing transformation of unreferenced data.
This clarifies when and where I need to ensure my geometry has a proper starting point.
